zh.lifeSummary: 當King Cadell ap Rhodri於0851年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素時，他的父親King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons32歲，母親Angharad ferch Meurig27歲。他於0880年之前與Elen 在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於0909年在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Cadell ap Rhodri于0851年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素时，他的父亲King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons32岁，母亲Angharad ferch Meurig27岁。他于0880年之前与Elen 在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于0909年在威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Cadell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When King Cadell ap Rhodri was born in 0851, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons, was 32 and his mother, Angharad ferch Meurig, was 27. He married Elen  before 0880, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 0909, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Cadell ap Rhodri est né en 0851, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Meurig, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elen  avant 0880, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 0909, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Cadell ap Rhodri 0851 in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons 32 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Meurig 27. Er hat vor 0880 in Europa Elen  geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 0909 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Cadell ap Rhodri è nato il nel 0851 nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Meurig, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elen  prima del 0880, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 0909, nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: King Cadell ap Rhodriが0851年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルで生まれた時，父King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britonsは32歳，母Angharad ferch Meurigは27歳であった。0880年以前にヨーロッパでElen と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は0909年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: King Cadell ap Rhodri(이)가 0851년 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Meurig(은)는 27세였다. 그는 0880년 이전 우럽에서 Elen (와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 0909년 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Cadell ap Rhodri nasceu em 0851, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Meurig, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elen  antes 0880, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 0909, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Cadell ap Rhodri родился в 0851 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Meurig, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elen  перед 0880 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 0909 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Cadell ap Rhodri nació en 0851, en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, King Rhodri ap Merfyn Frych of Wales and the Britons, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Meurig, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elen  antes de 0880, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 0909, en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 58 años.
